title: Banking on the "Golden Route": Shizuoka Financial Group and Bank of Nagoya Unveil JPY 22trn Integration Plan
tags: The Formation of Chiba Financial GroupIn September 2025, The Chiba Bank and The Chiba Kogyo Bank have jointly declared their resolution to pursue a management consolidation. Formalized at the time through the signing of a Memorandum of Understanding (MOU), the move aims to establish a new bank holding company that will serve as the wholly-owningJapan FinTech ObserverNorbert Gehrke
